title: Signal Availability Type
description: Commercial/provenance types for signals available for audience targeting

enumDescriptions.marketplace: Resold third-party segments (provider authorization verifiable via the provider's adagents.json)
enumDescriptions.custom: Source-native segment built on demand from models, composites, or buyer inputs - not attributable to a standing upstream provider
enumDescriptions.owned: First-party segments derived from data the signal agent or seller directly owns (retailer purchase data, publisher behavioral data, telco data)
